Squadron Damage and State Transition System

Implements damage application, state transitions, and destruction protection rules for EC4X combat (Section 7.3.3)

Damage ApplicationDamage Reset (between rounds)Critical Hit Special Rules (Section 7.3.3)Batch Damage OperationsQuery functionsString formatting for logs

Imports

types

Procs

proc `$`(change: StateChange): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Pretty print state change for logs 
proc applyDamageToSquadron(squadron: var CombatSquadron; damage: int;
                           roundNumber: int; isCriticalHit: bool): StateChange {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Apply damage to a squadron and handle state transitions Returns StateChange describing what happened

Destruction Protection (Section 7.3.3):

  • Squadron cannot go Undamaged → Crippled → Destroyed in same round
  • Critical hits bypass this protection
proc applyForceReduction(taskForce: var TaskForce; targetId: SquadronId;
                         damage: int; roundNumber: int): StateChange {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply Force Reduction rule for critical hits (Section 7.3.3) If insufficient damage to reduce target, reduce weakest unit instead 
proc applySimultaneousDamage(taskForce: var TaskForce; damageMap: seq[
    tuple[squadronId: SquadronId, damage: int, isCritical: bool]];
                             roundNumber: int): seq[StateChange] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Apply damage from multiple attackers simultaneously Handles overkill and destruction protection correctly

Section 7.3.3: All damage applied simultaneously, then state transitions evaluated

proc countAlive(taskForce: TaskForce): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Count non-destroyed squadrons 
proc findWeakestSquadron(taskForce: TaskForce): Option[SquadronId] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Find squadron with lowest current DS in Task Force Used for Force Reduction when critical hit can't reduce selected target 
proc getAliveSquadrons(taskForce: TaskForce): seq[CombatSquadron] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get all non-destroyed squadrons 
proc isCrippled(squadron: CombatSquadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if squadron is crippled 
proc isDestroyed(squadron: CombatSquadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if squadron is destroyed 
proc resetRoundDamage(squadron: var CombatSquadron) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Reset damage tracking at start of new round Destruction protection only applies within a single round
